Reentries.title: Reentries
Reentries.helpBody:
The Reentries menu has two tabs:

TIP Messages shows recent and upcoming satellite reentry predictions from the US Space Command. Clicking on a row will select that satellite and change the time to the predicted decay time.

Reentry Analysis shows objects sorted by lowest perigee that are most likely to reenter the atmosphere. Click any row to select the satellite.
Reentries.dataSource: Tracking and Impact Prediction (TIP) messages provided by the US Space Command (USSPACECOM).
